# TypesenseKit

> TypesenseKit is an independent, open-source Typesense CLI and MCP server for operating Typesense from a terminal, script, or AI agent.

## Product pages

- Typesense CLI: https://typesensekit.vercel.app/typesense-cli/
- Typesense MCP server: https://typesensekit.vercel.app/typesense-mcp/
- CLI guide: https://typesensekit.vercel.app/guides/cli/
- MCP guide: https://typesensekit.vercel.app/guides/mcp/
- AI client setup: https://typesensekit.vercel.app/guides/clients/

## Packages and source

- GitHub: https://github.com/akshitkrnagpal/typesensekit
- CLI package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@typesensekit/cli
- MCP package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@typesensekit/mcp
- API coverage: https://github.com/akshitkrnagpal/typesensekit/blob/main/docs/api-coverage.md

## Security

The MCP server is read-only by default. TypesenseKit redacts secrets, supports secure CLI profiles, and requires deliberate opt-in for MCP write tools. Use narrowly scoped Typesense API keys.
